description: Personalization system: favorite artists, favorite albums, recently played tracks, playlists/collections stored in localStorage. Dashboard/analytics page with user insights. Share/copy/download features. Enhanced error handling for offline, rate limits, and network failures.
steps: Create lib/personalization.ts - localStorage utilities for: (a) recently played tracks (add, get, max 50), (b) favorite artists (add, remove, get, isFavorite), (c) favorite albums (add, remove, get, isFavorite), (d) playlists/collections (create, add track, remove track, delete playlist, list playlists). Each with proper TypeScript interfaces.

Create app/components/PersonalizationContext.tsx - context provider that exposes all personalization state (recently played, favorite artists, favorite albums, playlists) with useSyncExternalStore pattern matching FavoritesContext.tsx.
Update app/layout.tsx to include PersonalizationContext provider.
Update AudioPlayerContext.tsx to track recently played - when a track starts playing, add it to recently played list via personalization context.
Add FavoriteArtistButton and FavoriteAlbumButton components (similar to existing FavoriteButton.tsx) for artist and album pages.

Create app/dashboard/page.tsx - Dashboard/analytics page showing: total favorite songs count, total favorite artists, total favorite albums, favorite genre (most common genre in favorites), most listened artist (from recently played), recently played summary (last 10 tracks), most searched genre (from recent searches if available). Use cards with icons and numbers. Make it responsive.
Create app/playlists/page.tsx - Playlists page where users can view their locally stored playlists/collections, create new ones, and manage tracks within them.

Add share functionality: Create app/components/ShareMenu.tsx - a dropdown menu on track/album/artist pages with options to: copy song info to clipboard, share via external links (generate Apple Music and YouTube search URLs), download album artwork (using anchor download attribute).
Add ShareMenu to track detail page, album detail page, and artist page.
Create app/components/OfflineDetector.tsx - a client component that listens to online/offline events and shows a banner when the user loses internet connection.

Update error handling in lib/itunes.ts and lib/lastfm.ts: detect rate limit responses (429 status), timeout errors, and network failures. Return structured error objects that components can use to display specific messages.
Update app/components/ErrorMessage.tsx to handle different error types: no results, no preview available, offline, rate limited. Show appropriate messages and retry buttons.
Update the shared Header component to include links to Dashboard and Playlists.
acceptance_criteria: Recently played tracks are recorded when audio plays and displayed on dashboard
Users can favorite artists and albums (in addition to existing song favorites)
Playlists page allows creating collections and adding/removing tracks
Dashboard shows analytics: total favorites, favorite genre, most played artist, recent activity
Share menu allows copying song info and generating external links
Offline banner appears when internet connection is lost
Rate limit and network errors show user-friendly messages with retry option
All personalization data persists in localStorage
Navigation includes links to Dashboard and Playlists
bun run build passes without errors
findings: All steps implemented successfully. Build and lint pass clean. Used useSyncExternalStore for OfflineDetector to avoid lint rule about setState in effects. RecentlyPlayedTracker uses a separate component that listens to AudioPlayerContext state changes and writes to personalization context. The dashboard/playlists pages are static client components that read from localStorage. Structured error variants added as separate functions (searchTracksWithError etc.) to maintain backward compatibility with existing code.
